title: Special Needs Accommodation Support Playbook for Hotels in Egypt
trigger: A guest requests special needs accommodation at the hotel.

steps.title: Receive and Acknowledge Request
steps.action: Upon receiving a request for special needs accommodation, the front desk staff should acknowledge the request immediately and assure the guest of our commitment to their comfort and safety.

steps.title: Assess Accommodation Requirements
steps.action: Consult with the guest to understand their specific needs. This may include mobility assistance, visual or auditory aids, or dietary requirements. Document these needs in the PMS.

steps.title: Arrange Mobility Assistance
steps.action: Coordinate with housekeeping to ensure the room is equipped with necessary mobility aids such as wheelchair ramps or shower chairs. Confirm availability and readiness with the guest.

steps.title: Provide Visual or Auditory Aids
steps.action: Ensure that devices such as text telephones (TTY) or visual alert systems are available and functional in the guest's room. Confirm with the guest that these meet their needs.

steps.title: Address Dietary Requirements
steps.action: Inform the F&B team of any specific dietary needs. Ensure that the kitchen staff is aware and prepared to accommodate these requests during meal preparations.

steps.title: Confirm Arrangements with Guest
steps.action: Once all accommodations are arranged, contact the guest to confirm that their needs have been met and offer any additional assistance if required.

steps.title: Document and Follow-Up
steps.action: Document the accommodations provided in the guest's profile for future reference. Schedule a follow-up call or visit to ensure ongoing satisfaction.

description: This playbook outlines the steps for accommodating special needs requests from hotel guests in Egypt, ensuring compliance with local regulations and enhancing guest satisfaction.
escalation_path: If any step cannot be completed, escalate to the Support Manager for immediate resolution.
